series_metadata.series_description: The Charity Fund Raising Files cover the Combined Charitable Campaign, Operation Feed, and the Holiday Food Basket fund drives organized by the BWC. The Charity Fund Raising Files may contain posters announcing fund the raising events, compact discs, copies of checks listing the BWC employees’ names, addresses, amounts, related correspondence ( e.g. emails), deposit statements from the banks, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office , and ; Electronic: in office , and
